items.name_en: MiuMiu Mini Shell Handbag/Crossbody Bag is now live!!
items.name_cn:
MiuMiu Mini Shell Handbag/Crossbody Bag is now live!!
Who can refuse a retro and playful shell bag? The faded leather color and texture paired with a metal belt buckle looks premium and vintage. Made of lambskin with a refined design and a square retro shape.
Switch between hand, underarm, and crossbody carry!
Elegant for commuting, super easy to wear. Join MiuMiu 👧🏻 now!
Size:21X13.5X 8cm
Model:5BP090

items.name_en: 5BB117: Miu Miu New Briefcase, featuring this year's popular new velvet leather, hot all over the internet, canvas lining. This bag is cool, capturing a refined multifunctional design that blends men's and women's elements. Casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Super large capacity and lightweight. Simple yet not simple. Fashion bloggers almost all have one. Size: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging)

items.name_en: Original Miu Miu 5BB142 New Bowling Bag, a main item on the official website, an absolutely explosive style this year 🔥. Top-grade imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern. The bag is exquisite, three-dimensional, and structured. The front engraved logo echoes the leather color. Removable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap. Cotton satin lining, with zippered pocket. Many celebrities and influencers are wearing this style. Size: 22X10.5X7.5Cm, with original packaging
